item.title: Hostinger Review for Freelancers 2026 — Is Under $3/Month Worth It?
item.description: Honest Hostinger review for freelancers. We cover pricing, portfolio site setup, India market plans, and exactly who should — and shouldn't — use it.

item.title: About SoloBrief
item.description: Honest AI tool reviews for freelancers and solopreneurs — no hype, just tools that actually work.

item.title: Affiliate Disclosure
item.description: SoloBrief affiliate disclosure — how we earn commissions and how it affects (or doesn't affect) our reviews.
